{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221903287EDCD514564E93F82654"}"},"total":154},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600300069939118910","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错 大体都很好看，男女主的人设我很喜欢ヾ(*ΦωΦ)ツ"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769587432,"group_id":"7549389126810749976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4/Ibrs0Z+IkEgcFI1Hr44KbT1LV4w/cObbeSZ3tQ+Qp","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/91ac16dc2a6d44e482c7bc6eb6311ff7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706052&x-signature=AQiRUH4X4rple0EaDalk8Se9jy4%3D","user_id":"3391373843632254","user_name":"喜欢翠云草的老千"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3391373843632254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549389126810749976","book_info":{"abstract":"现代病秧子一朝穿越，成了宁远侯府的庶长子苏亦珩，早产体弱，亲娘早逝，幼妹伶仃，还有个佛口蛇心的嫡母，要想安稳度日，武将的路子走不通，那就走科举的文官之路！
弱了两辈子的苏亦珩，看着飞檐走壁，英姿飒爽的少女：“萧姑娘，在下不才，可为良婿否？”
萧云姝面上镇定，心里乐开了花，观音娘娘对自己的祈祷还是听进去了的，这不，多合她心意的郎君啊～","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cc90c96ef9c6961bd924773b51e61478","author":"庄生迷","author_id":"","book_id":"7549389126810749976","book_name":"穿成侯府庶子，我靠科举封妻荫子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7549389182976655896","read_count":"15238","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"530486"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"245","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿越,今穿古,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f152a9b8ba796515e6cc1d1537458b7b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361408&x-signature=Dn39rzf3eBtqE1JweGb1s6zgqRE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"200526539550547","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"264"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221903287EDCD514564E93F82654"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
